why_now: The marketing selector now consults cron live state for post-cooldown StackOverflow truth, so stale scheduler running flags can directly suppress the next legitimate lane.

Fresh cron inspection showed multiple unrelated jobs simultaneously marked running with the same runningAtMs value, which is strong evidence of leaked scheduler state rather than real concurrent job execution.
Local selector hardening is higher leverage than generating another StackOverflow packet because the current packet already ran or was delivered inside the active review window.

repair.behavior_change: A cron job marked running no longer keeps the StackOverflow post-cooldown lane artificially current once a newer StackOverflow lane artifact already exists after the scheduled slot.
repair.scope: marketing-local truth hardening to resist stale cron running flags

verification.note: Broader certification scripts still report pre-existing failures in marketing_loop_independent_verify.py and marketing_loop_verifier.py.

replacement_condition: If scheduler running-state leakage is repaired centrally later, this local guard can remain as a truth-preserving backstop.
